# Qalam Digital

Qalam Digital is an AI-powered digital marketing and creative growth agency based in Erode, Tamil Nadu, India.

Website: https://www.qalamdigital.com/
Email: qalamdigitalsolution@gmail.com
Phone: +91 93611 04499
Phone: +91 89039 17470
Address: 3, Commercial Complex, Near Police Station, BP Agramharam, Erode - 5, Tamil Nadu, India

## Founders

- Mahatheer Muhammadh: Founder and Graphic Designer
- Cheraman Salahudheen: Co-Founder and Digital Marketing Executive

## Services

- Meta Ads management
- Google Ads management
- SEO, AEO and GEO optimization
- Brand identity design
- UI UX design
- Landing page design
- Website design and development
- Social media management
- Print design
- AI-powered marketing strategy

Qalam Digital serves businesses in Erode, Tamil Nadu and across India.
